name: CLX - Stripe Provision On Payment v1

nodes.name: Webhook
nodes.notes: DEACTIVATED. PUBLIC. Configure a Stripe webhook endpoint at this URL (event: checkout.session.completed). On a paid Payment Link, auto-provisions the buyer. Needs STRIPE_SECRET_KEY + POSTMARK_API_TOKEN. Each Payment Link must carry metadata 'product' (e.g. sales_engine) and optionally 'selected_plan'.

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ ok: true, provisioned: true, email: $('Build Emails').item.json.email }) }}
